Hero.description: We design and build professional websites for entrepreneurs and businesses ready to grow online. Fast, no surprises, with results.

Services.title: Tailor-made web solutions
Services.description: From a converting landing page to a full online store. We adapt to your budget and goals.
Services.s1Desc: Professional presence that builds trust and generates business opportunities.
Services.s2Desc: Full e-commerce with payment gateway, inventory and design that sells.
Services.s3Desc: Pages focused on converting visitors into customers with every detail.
Services.s4Desc: Continuous technical support to keep your site always updated and secure.
Services.s5Desc: We position your website on Google so your customers find you on their own.

Process.title: Simple, clear and no surprises
Process.s1Desc: We talk about your project, goals and budget. No commitments.
Process.s2Desc: Within 48h you receive a detailed quote and delivery timeline.
Process.s3Desc: We design and build with weekly reviews for your approval.
Process.s4Desc: Your website live with 30 days of free support included.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.description: Projects that reflect our focus on design, speed and real results.

nomada.title: Nómada Store
nomada.summary: Slow fashion store · Next.js + admin panel · Colombian artisans

About.p1: We are Klyro, a boutique web studio based in Bogotá. We work with entrepreneurs and businesses that want a professional digital presence without the prices or bureaucracy of a large agency.
About.p2: We treat every project as if it were our own — with attention to detail, realistic deadlines and honest communication at every step.
About.v1Desc: We deliver in 2 to 4 weeks because we respect your time. No rush that ruins the result.
About.v2Desc: We don't make pretty websites just for the sake of it. Every design decision has a purpose: converting visitors into customers.
About.v3Desc: No middlemen or huge agencies. You speak directly with whoever designs and develops your project.

CTA.description:
Tell us your idea and in 48 hours you have a proposal in your inbox.
No hidden costs. No surprises.
CTA.whatsappMessage: Hi Klyro, I'd like to talk about my web project.

ContactModal.title: Tell us about your project
ContactModal.subtitle: Reply in less than 48h · No commitments
ContactModal.successDesc: We'll get back to you in less than 48 hours with a personalized proposal.
ContactModal.placeholderMessage: Tell us briefly what you need...
